purpose: Independent admission gate before suite equivalence or semantic bias analysis.

checks.requirement: Record authorship, commits, Claude-derived portions, and independent non-Claude review.
Map fixed and adjudicated-open behavior to source traceability evidence.
Two reviewer sign-offs, including one blinded where practical.
Every material OPEN dimension has a discriminating single-fault mutant.

admission_rule: All checks must be accepted before external authoring enters semantic bias analysis.
validation_errors: mutant_adequacy: executable accepted mutants and expected-kill rows required
